def solve(prices : Array(Int64), strategy : Array(Int64), k : Int64) : Int64
  n = prices.size
  prefix_prices = Array.new(n + 1) { 0 }
  for i in 0..n-1
    prefix_prices[i+1] = prefix_prices[i] + prices[i]
  end

  prefix_strategy = Array.new(n + 1) { 0 }
  for i in 0..n-1
    prefix_strategy[i+1] = prefix_strategy[i] + strategy[i] * prices[i]
  end

  original_profit = prefix_strategy[n]
  max_gain = 0
  half_k = k / 2

  for i in 0..(n - k)
    original_contribution = prefix_strategy[i + k] - prefix_strategy[i]
    sum_second_half = prefix_prices[i + k] - prefix_prices[i + half_k]
    gain = sum_second_half - original_contribution
    if gain > max_gain
      max_gain = gain
    end
  end

  original_profit + max_gain
end
```

long long solve(std::vector<long long> prices, std::vector<long long> strategy, long long k) {

    // compute prefix sums for prices and strategy * prices.

    int n = prices.size();

    // prefix_sum_prices: size n+1

    std::vector<long long> prefix_prices(n + 1, 0);

    for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {

        prefix_prices[i+1] = prefix_prices[i] + prices[i];

    }

    // prefix_sum_strategy: size n+1

    std::vector<long long> prefix_strategy(n + 1, 0);

    for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {

        prefix_strategy[i+1] = prefix_strategy[i] + strategy[i] * prices[i];

    }

    long long original_profit = prefix_strategy[n];

    long long max_gain = 0;

    long long half_k = k / 2;

    for (int i = 0; i <= n - k; ++i) {

        // compute original_contribution for window [i, i + k -1]

        long long original_contribution = prefix_strategy[i + k] - prefix_strategy[i];

        // compute sum_second_half_prices: from i + half_k to i + k -1

        long long sum_second_half = prefix_prices[i + k] - prefix_prices[i + half_k];

        long long gain = sum_second_half - original_contribution;

        if (gain > max_gain) {

            max_gain = gain;

        }

    }

    return original_profit + max_gain;

}
